descFull: https://jessielw.github.io/Reclaimerr/ - Automatically reclaim space in your media library using customizable rules. Integrates with Jellyfin, Plex, and Emby (any or all of them) to analyze and manage your content. Functions similarly to Seerr (in reverse), providing efficient media cleanup
